category_sources: source_facts.description: Generates server-side and client-side code for web and RPC services; official go-zero docs describe goctl as a code-generation CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: goctl; official go-zero install docs call it goctl.
docs_sources: Official go-zero documentation has dedicated goctl installation and CLI reference pages.
